raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ca XXXX XXXX XXXX Date : XX/XX/year> Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, DE XXXX RE : Dispute of Account Balance Request for Verification and Removal Account Number : [ Your Account Number ] Balance in Dispute : {$1300.00} To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute the balance of {$1300.00} that has been reported on my Barclays credit card account. This account was transferred from another credit card company on or around XX/XX/year>. Since this transfer, I have contacted customer service multiple times, and I have been informed that no transaction details, statements, or supporting documentation are available to show how this balance was calculated.

Under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) and the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ), I am requesting the following : 1. A complete itemized statement of all transactions, charges, fees, or interest that make up the disputed balance ; 2. Verification and documentation from the original creditor showing how this amount was transferred and validated ; 3. Immediate removal of the disputed {$1300.00} balance from my account if Barclays is unable to provide the required documentation ; 4. Correction of any negative or incorrect credit reporting associated with this disputed amount.

Until proper verification is provided, I am requesting that Barclays treat this amount as in dispute and cease collection activity in accordance with federal law.

Please provide the requested documentation in writing to the address listed above. I expect a response within the legally required time frame.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 

Sincerely, [ XXXX XXXX ]
